rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: agentic PRs shift burden to reviewers; review bottleneck; quantifies deletion load
rationale.quality-debt: characterizes redundant/unnecessary AI-generated methods; maintainability decline
rationale.ai-review: GPT-4o baseline fails; conflates local quality with system-level necessity
rationale.built-system: implemented Random Forest deletion predictor, evaluated, replication package
rationale.routing-signal: deletion-prediction signal for reviewer prioritization; measurand quality; no gating logic
rationale.risk-quality: empirical focal analysis of redundant code; measurand quality
rationale.method-mining: mines AIDev PRs/repos characterizing deletion patterns
